description: Canonical FP/FiQA sentiment split and model metrics (notebooks 03, 04a, 04b). Exact per-source counts in data/credit_risk_sentiment/processed/meta.json after running 03.
note: Per-dataset (PhraseBank vs FiQA) F1 can be computed from 04a/04b when loading processed parquets with source column; val n per source ~100 PB, ~12 FiQA.
